response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON was empty for the lyrics of 'Deep Dive' and talk content. Used 100% manual transcription and translation for both segments.
2. JSON Usage: Fully analyzed the visual and auditory context of the VTuber Todoroki Hajime's livestream performance to deliver highly accurate transcriptions and translations.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles to follow the rapid speech during her energetic talking segment and matched the fast-paced transitions of the song 'Deep Dive' flawlessly.

subtitles.original: わあ！皆さん、やったあ！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Waa! Everyone, we did it! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 仲間と励まし合って...
subtitles.english: Encouraging each other with my friends...

subtitles.original: みんなから勇気をもらって...
subtitles.english: getting courage from everyone...

subtitles.original: こうしてステージに立って、たくさんの人の前でパフォーマンスすることができました！ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: and standing on the stage like this, I was able to perform in front of so many people! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そして、なんと！Xトレンド1位！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: And also, incredibly, #1 on X trend! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そして、チャンネル登録者様も、120万人様にいったみたいで、本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: And also, it seems like our subscriber count has reached 1.2 million! Thank you very, very much!

subtitles.original: わあ！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Waa! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: こうしてね、こう夢を追いかけて、上京して、こう、たくさんの人のスターになることができました！轟はじめです！
subtitles.english: Chasing my dream and moving to Tokyo, I was able to become a star for so many people! I'm Todoroki Hajime!

subtitles.original: でも、この物語を作るにあたって、たくさんの素敵なアーティストちゃんの楽曲をお借りして、あの、作ることができましたので、本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: But in making this story, we were able to borrow songs from many wonderful artists to make this, so thank you so much!

subtitles.original: はじめも、曲をたくさん作れるように、頑張ります！
subtitles.english: Hajime will also do her best to write lots of songs!

subtitles.original: そして、え、これがはじめの100万人記念の新衣装になりまーす！
subtitles.english: And, this is Hajime's new outfit commemorating 1 million subscribers!

subtitles.original: 衣装の名前は『ボーダーコード』衣装です！市原達也さんに仕立てていただきました！
subtitles.english: The name of the outfit is 'Border Code'! It was tailored by Tatsuya Ichihara!

subtitles.original: 皆さんね、応援してくれたおかげです！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to everyone's support! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: で、今回の新衣装、髪がロング、そして、足がなんか、すごく長く見えるデザインで...
subtitles.english: And for this new outfit, the hair is long, and the design makes my legs look really long...

subtitles.original: ほら、セクシーな美脚！
subtitles.english: Look, sexy beautiful legs!

subtitles.original: どう？皆さん、なんかおかしくない？ピョコピョコがない！嘘だ、そんなバカな！そんなバカな！ピョコピョコがないだと？
subtitles.english: What do you think? Everyone, isn't something strange? My hair wiggles are gone! No way, that's impossible! That's impossible! The hair wiggles are gone?

subtitles.original: うわあ、嘘です！ピョコピョコもあります！わあ！ま、ピョコピョコないと脳みそ出ちゃうからね。必要だよね。
subtitles.english: Whoa, just kidding! I have the hair wiggles too! Yay! Well, if I don't have the wiggles, my brains would spill out. They are necessary, right?

subtitles.original: であと、ジャケットも脱げます！ほら！ほらセクシー！うわあ！詳しくはこの後のメンゲンで紹介するので、気になる方は見に来てください！
subtitles.english: And also, I can take off the jacket! Look! Look, sexy! Whoa! I'll introduce the details in the member-only stream after this, so if you're interested, please come watch!

subtitles.original: 続いて、なんと！新曲を披露しようと思います！皆さん、盛り上がる準備できてますか？うおーい！
subtitles.english: And next, guess what! I'm going to perform my new song! Everyone, are you ready to get hyped? Whooo!

subtitles.original: ロング可愛い？ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Long hair is cute? Thank you!

subtitles.original: とてもね、かっこよくて、なんかセクシーな感じの曲になっているので、ぜひ、聴いてください！それでは、行きます！『Deep Dive』！
subtitles.english: It's a really cool and somewhat sexy song, so please listen to it! Well then, here we go! "Deep Dive"!
